items.summary: DeviceRadixSort/radix_sort_keys drops & misorders keys when begin_bit>0 and end_bit==key width (gfx90a, ROCm 7.2.1)
cudaArrayLayered+SurfaceLoadStore array written layer-by-layer collapses its layer dimension on later-launch reads (gfx90a, ROCm 7.2.1)
Feature request: low-level cusolverSp sparse factorization API (csrqr*/csrchol*, csrlsvluHost, csrsymrcm) has no hipSOLVER path
ROCm 7.2.1 ships no libcu++ (<cuda/std/*>); ROCm/libhipcxx fills it. Revisit: gsplat 3DGUT path (needs cuda::std::optional) and the MPPI-Generic cuda::std->std workaround
Concluded NOT a ROCm bug: atomicMin/Max on fine-grained/remote memory needs system-scope atomics (usage requirement). Minor doc papercut could still be filed
NPP-based GPU image filters have no ROCm equivalent; ops report unsupported and the CPU/IPP path is used. A rocfft/rocAL or hand-written HIP image-filter path could restore GPU acceleration

Non-default SlabHash hashmap backend is wave64-incorrect (32-lane __ffs/__ballot election); compiles but tests excluded under USE_HIP. A wave64-correct rewrite would re-enable it (default StdGPU backend already works)
